raw.message:
Welcome to My Premier League Wish. Whether it’s something big, something simple, or something for someone you care about, we’d love to hear the Premier League wish that would mean the most to you 💫
The Premier League will bring a selection of wishes to life, with plenty of additional prizes for fans along the way 🎁
Open for entries until 26 May 2026.

hook.summary: Brenden Aaronson sets up a transition shot by placing the camera on the grass.
hook.visual_action: A man in a football kit looks at the camera and places it face-down on the turf.

scene_flow: Brenden Aaronson places the camera on the indoor pitch turf for a transition.
Quick cuts showing the details of the new Leeds United kit and club crest.
Brenden signs a jersey on a table for a giveaway.
Brenden picks up the camera wearing the new kit and points to the Premier League app text.
Final shot of Brenden holding up the signed jersey to the camera.
audience_proxy: Football fans and Leeds United supporters looking for exclusive team content and giveaways.
